contactID.description: Id of the contact associated with this owner draw.

destinationAccountID.description: Id of the bank account where the payment will be made from.

glAccountID.description: Id of the general ledger account associated with this owner draw.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with this owner draw.

refNo.description: Check no required when payment method is Hand written check (i.e toBePrinted = false).

toBePrinted.description: Indicates if Check is to be printed.
